payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark-stained wooden side table with a rectangular top, turned front legs and a visible lower shelf holding small items; glossy finish with minor surface wear, tabletop shows a potted plant and papers; right side of the table is cut off by the image edge — estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.
